subcodes.first_line: Every Manifestation is the Adam of His time... There were one hundred thousand Adams before the Adam of biblical records each being the Manifestation of his own time or cycle.
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @station of the Manifestation of God
